allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"kullaniciAdi":"tunahan.basar","sifre":"Arabica.2026!"}' -TimeoutSec 10; echo "LOGIN_OK rol=$\($r.rol\) tokenLen=$\($r.token.Length\)" } catch { echo "LOGIN_FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { echo "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } }; echo "=== health ==="; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/health" -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { echo "health: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
